properties.name: langchain4j.google-ai-gemini.api-key
properties.description: API Key for Google Gemini AI authentication.

properties.name: langchain4j.google-ai-gemini.model-name
properties.description: Target model name for Google Gemini AI (e.g. gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-1.5-flash).

properties.name: langchain4j.google-ai-gemini.temperature
properties.description: Temperature parameter for Gemini AI response generation.

properties.name: langchain4j.agentic.enabled
properties.description: Specifies whether to enable autonomous agentic workflows.
